title: ApprovalPacket V1
description: Structured approval packet for human review of orchestrator approval decisions. Contains purpose, plan, risks, budgets, outputs, rollback, and checklist.

schema_version.description: Schema version, always 1 for this schema.

gate_id.description: Approval category identifier (A1–A5) for the approval checkpoint being requested.

run_id.description: Run identifier this approval belongs to.

purpose.description: 1–3 sentence description of what this approval authorizes.

budgets.description: Resource budget limits for this approval scope.

rollback.description: Rollback plan if execution fails or is rejected.

commands.description: Shell commands that will be executed upon approval.

checklist.description: Human-readable checklist items for the reviewer.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC Z timestamp of when approval was requested.

context_pack_path.description: Relative path to the context pack file.

run_card_path.description: Relative path to the run card.

run_card_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the run card (canonical JSON).

plan_ssot_pointer.description: JSON pointer to the plan in state.json.

plan_step_ids.description: Plan step IDs covered by this approval.

active_branch_id.description: Currently active branch ID (if branching is in use).

gate_resolution_trace.description: Approval-resolution provenance for this request, showing how A0–A5 approval requirements were derived from policy, run-card, workflow defaults, or CLI overrides.

details_md.description: Optional extended details in Markdown format.
